stories.title: Device V2 legacy bridge contract
stories.scope: Add or verify a single-device Device V2 to Device V1 bridge contract for operation entries. Return confirmed device_v1_code or explicit missing-field/sync error; reuse existing sync-to-v1 logic.
stories.nonGoals: Do not change old Device V1 behavior. Do not add migrations, dependencies, mock data, silent empty success, or production config changes.
acceptance: Frontend can request bridge status/ensure for one V2 code.
Response includes confirmed V1 code or explicit blocker reason.
Missing V1 required fields fail loudly.
Existing sync-to-v1 behavior remains covered.
Evidence summary is written.
notes: Existing sync-to-v1 already backfills device_v1_code and legacy_device_code.
No intelligent frontend parsing should be required after this story.

stories.title: Frontend V1 code gate
stories.scope: Add a centralized frontend gate on the Device V2 redesign page that obtains confirmed V1 code before any old operation entry runs. Show bridge errors directly and stop the action.
stories.nonGoals: Do not open terminal, monitoring, audit, or log views in this story. Do not infer V1 code from unrelated fields.
acceptance: One shared gate function exists.
Gate uses backend bridge response.
Failure state is visible in UI.
No action continues after bridge failure.
Evidence summary is written.
notes: Keep old inventory page behavior unchanged.

stories.title: Monitoring and WebShell entries
stories.scope: Add Device V2 row/detail entries for monitoring and WebShell. Use the gate V1 code, old TerminalFull route, and old Grafana dashboard lookup/variables.
stories.nonGoals: Do not migrate GPU, old out-band logs, or Loki logs. Do not change the old inventory page user path.
acceptance: Monitoring entry uses confirmed V1 device facts.
WebShell opens TerminalFull with V1 hostCode.
Row and detail entry points are present.
Old inventory behavior is preserved.
Evidence summary is written.
notes: If old code is touched, keep changes extraction-only and behavior-preserving.

stories.title: Operation audit entry
stories.scope: Add Device V2 operation audit entry using confirmed V1 code. Reuse terminal record list/replay/download behavior and expose empty/error states without silent defaults.
stories.nonGoals: Do not change terminal record backend semantics. Do not invent audit records or return fake empty success.
acceptance: Audit query uses V1 instance_code.
Replay/download reuse old implementation.
Empty and error states are distinguishable.
Old audit tab behavior is preserved.
Evidence summary is written.
notes: Do not rename user-facing 安全审计 unless the surrounding V2 copy clearly uses 操作审计.

stories.title: Loki log placeholder entry
stories.scope: Add a Device V2 日志 entry that clearly states Loki query details are pending user confirmation. Do not issue any Loki request or show old out-band logs.
stories.nonGoals: Do not implement Loki queries, log type selectors, or old out-band log migration.
acceptance: Entry label is 日志.
Pending contract items are shown.
No Loki network request is made.
Old 带外日志 is not reused.
Evidence summary is written.
notes: List pending contract: log type, label, time range, permission, API.

stories.title: Device V2 operations evidence
stories.scope: Run focused FE/BE validation and browser checks for Device V2 operation entries. Record real pass evidence or exact blockers under the d2v2 evidence directory.
stories.nonGoals: Do not broaden scope to unrelated D2 pages. Do not use screenshots, HTTP 200, or typecheck alone as success.
acceptance: Go and FE validation results are recorded.
Browser evidence covers row/detail entries.
Old inventory regression check is recorded.
Any blocker is precise and actionable.
Batch summary is updated.
notes: If the app is served on another Vite port, record the observed port.
